subject: Modify VFC health check API to health check
commit_message:
Modify VFC health check API to health check

Change-Id: I63771469cebce6855658477e3f0429b6fe35a3bb
Issue-ID: VFC-1618
Signed-off-by: yangyan <yangyanyj@chinamobile.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 2: Published edit on patch set 1.

Patch Set 2:

Can you post results from a check check of msb and vfc from one of the running intances with this patch ?

Patch Set 2:

@ Brian Freeman: After our test environment modifies the robot script according to the submitted patch, a health check is performed on VFC and MSB, and the result seems to be successful.Please see:
